zh.lifeSummary: Adela de Vernon於0996年出生在法國諾門迪艾弗農。她和Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin至少有7個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1092年在法國諾門迪享年96歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Adela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Adele  , especially popular in the late 19th century.

variants.name: Adella
meanings: form of   Adele  , especially popular in the late 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: Adela de Vernon was born in 0996, in Vernon, Eure, Normandy, France. She had at least 7 sons and 2 daughters with Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin. She died in 1092, in Normandy, France, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Adela de Vernon est née en 0996, à Vernon, Eure, Normandie, France. Elle a eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles avec Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin. Elle est décédée en 1092, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 96 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Adela de Vernon wurde 0996 in Vernon, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Sie hatte mit Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1092 im Alter von 96 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Adela de Vernon è nata il nel 0996 nel Vernon, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Lei avuto almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie con Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin. Morì nel 1092, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 96 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adela de Vernonは0996年にフランスノーマンディエウアバーノンで生まれた。彼女はNeel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentinとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1092年にフランスノーマンディで96歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adela de Vernon(은)는 0996년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 베른넌에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1092년 프랑스 노먼디에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.St Sauvuer, Normandy or Halton, Cheshire: Halton, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Adela de Vernon nasceu em 0996, em Vernon, Eure, Normandie, França. Ela teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas com Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin. Ela faleceu em 1092, em Normandie, França, com 96 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Adela de Vernon родилась в 0996 г. в местности вирнон, эур, норманди, Франция. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери от Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin. Она умерла в 1092 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 96 лет.

sm.from 1021 to 1053: mai le 1021 e o'o I le 1053

es.lifeSummary: Adela de Vernon nació en 0996, en Vernon, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas con Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin. Murió en 1092, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 96 años.
